output.title: Sesame + tamarind aubergines with cracked wheat
output.description: Typical Andhra-style dish with tamarind and sesame.

steps.title: Blend the sauce
steps.content: Place the tomatoes, sesame seeds, garlic, tamarind paste, cumin, coriander, chilli powder and salt into a blender and whizz to a sauce.

steps.title: Cook the aubergines
steps.content: Put the oil into a large lidded frying pan over medium heat. Add the onion and fry until soft and golden. Add the sauce, then the aubergines and water. Cover and cook until tender.
